title: Totem of Undying Yuji
description: This Totem pack replaces the Totem of Undying with a pixel-art design of Itadori Yuji
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4b77fb635db01dd9e0080f27005306d03d1b0f8b.png)

# ✨ **Cursed Totem – Yuji the Vessel**

**Carry the power of Sukuna’s vessel into Minecraft.**
This Totem Factory DBX pack replaces the **Totem of Undying** with a pixel-art design of **Itadori Yuji**, bringing cursed energy into every revival. Perfect for Jujutsu Kaisen fans who want a stylish survival companion.

---

## ⭐ Features

* 🎨 **Custom Totem of Undying** retextured as *Yuji Itadori*
* ✨ **Pixel-art style** faithful to Jujutsu Kaisen aesthetics
* 🗡️ Inspired by Yuji’s role as Sukuna’s vessel
* ⚡ Works seamlessly with other Totem Factory DBX packs
* 📦 Lightweight `.zip` resource pack, easy to install

---

## 🔧 Installation

1. Download the `.zip` file
2. Place it inside your `resourcepacks` folder
3. Activate in Minecraft → Options → Resource Packs
4. Revive in style with Yuji’s cursed strength!

---
